Operation 'listCurrencies' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too narrow (mentions only IDs). Description lacks clarity about what 'currency details' means and doesn't explain the response structure. Enhanced version clarifies that this returns Currency objects with metadata, explains both list and filtered retrieval modes, and helps AI agents understand the bulk retrieval capability.

data.current_description: Returns all currency IDs, or currency details when ids parameter is provided.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all available in-game currency definitions or specific currencies when filtered by IDs. Returns an array of Currency objects containing currency metadata including name, description, and icon information. Supports bulk retrieval via the ids parameter for efficient data fetching.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too narrow (mentions only IDs). Description lacks clarity about what 'currency details' means and doesn't explain the response structure. Enhanced version clarifies that this returns Currency objects with metadata, explains both list and filtered retrieval modes, and helps AI agents understand the bulk retrieval capability.

message: Operation 'listAchievements' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too narrow (only mentions IDs). Description lacks clarity about parameter behavior, pagination support, and return value structure. Enhanced version explains conditional behavior, pagination options, and explicit return types to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns all achievement IDs, or achievement details when ids parameter is provided.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of all achievement IDs by default. When the ids parameter is provided with specific achievement IDs, returns detailed information for those achievements including tiers and requirements. Supports pagination via page and page_size parameters. Returns an array of achievement IDs or achievement objects depending on parameters.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too narrow (only mentions IDs). Description lacks clarity about parameter behavior, pagination support, and return value structure. Enhanced version explains conditional behavior, pagination options, and explicit return types to improve AI agent interpretability.
